summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations chatbot improvements (iteration 8). ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: 10/10 checks passed. The Dio chatbot now features cached system prompt for speed, shorter conversational responses, quick reply buttons, typing indicator, and 'Online now' status.
passed_tests: GET /api/chatbot/greeting returns 200 with greeting message
Greeting messages have variation (random selection from pool)
POST /api/chat returns 200 with response field
POST /api/chat returns quick_replies array in response
Chat responses are short (2-4 sentences, ~200 chars)
Responses cleaned of [QUICK_REPLIES:], [LEAD_INFO:], [SHOW_PORTFOLIO:] tags
session_id echoed correctly in response
Multi-turn conversation works (3 sequential messages)
GET /api/chat/{session_id}/history returns 200 with messages
History contains user + assistant messages with role and content
PUT /api/chatbot/settings returns 200 for admin
Settings update clears _cached_system_message (cache invalidation)
GET /api/chatbot/settings returns settings data for admin
DELETE /api/chat/{session_id} returns 200 and clears session
Frontend: Chat auto-opens on first visit with typing indicator
Frontend: 3 default quick reply buttons shown after greeting
Frontend: Clicking quick reply sends message and gets response with new quick replies
Frontend: Quick replies hide during loading, reappear after response
Frontend: 'Online now' with green dot displayed in header
Frontend: Typing indicator shows animated bouncing dots during loading
Frontend: Manual message input and send button work
Frontend: Close button closes chat window
Frontend: Toggle button shows when chat closed
Frontend: New Chat button resets conversation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot improvements are fully functional. Key features: 1) _cached_system_message caches system prompt until admin saves settings (PUT /api/chatbot/settings clears it), 2) System prompt includes QUICK_REPLIES instruction, LLM generates [QUICK_REPLIES:opt1|opt2|opt3] tags which are parsed via parse_quick_replies() and returned in API response, 3) Frontend shows DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES after greeting, then dynamic ones from API after each message, 4) TypingIndicator component shows 3 bouncing dots during loading, 5) Header shows 'Online now' with green dot. To test auto-open: clear sessionStorage('dio_greeted') and localStorage('dio_session_id').

features_verified.cached_system_prompt: Working - _cached_system_message stores prompt, cleared when admin saves settings
features_verified.trimmed_system_prompt: Working - Prompt is concise with RULES: Keep replies SHORT (2-4 sentences max)
features_verified.quick_reply_backend: Working - parse_quick_replies() extracts [QUICK_REPLIES:a|b|c] from LLM response
features_verified.quick_reply_frontend: Working - quickReplies state, handleQuickReply() function, DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES constant
features_verified.typing_indicator_greeting: Working - Shows during auto-open greeting load (1.2s delay)
features_verified.typing_indicator_loading: Working - Shows during API call (isLoading || showTyping)
features_verified.online_status_header: Working - 'Online now' text + green dot in chat header
features_verified.follow_up_questions: Working - Responses end with question like 'What are you hoping to achieve?'
features_verified.multi_turn_conversation: Working - Context maintained across messages via LlmChat session

response.response: Hey there! DioCreations can help you with all sorts of digital solutions, from building killer websites and mobile apps to boosting your visibility with SEO and AI solutions. What are you hoping to achieve?
quick_replies: What AI solutions do you offer?
